SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

umm.digiquilt.model.works
Class UndoRedoStack

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.model.works.UndoRedoStack

public class UndoRedoStack
extends Object

Holds UndoElements and takes care of undo and redo operations, as well as turning on and off any relevent buttons depending on if there are any undos or redos possible.

Version:
$Revision: 1.2 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-06-15 20:59:50 $

Field Summary
protected  List<AbstractButton> redoListeners
          List of AbstractButtons, which are enabled or disabled depending on if a redo is possible.
protected  Stack<Block> redoStack
          Stack holding all the elements in the redo queue.
protected  List<AbstractButton> undoListeners
          List of AbstractButtons, which are enabled or disabled depending on if an undo is possible.
protected  Stack<Block> undoStack
          Stack holding all the elements in the undo queue.
 
Constructor Summary
UndoRedoStack()
           
 
Method Summary
 void addRedo(Block redo)
          Push an Block on to the redo stack.
 void addRedoButton(AbstractButton button)
          Subscribe an AbstractButton to be turned on and off depending on if a Redo is possible.
 void addUndo(Block undo)
          Push an Block on to the undo stack.
 void addUndoButton(AbstractButton button)
          Subscribe an AbstractButton to be turned on and off depending on if an Undo is possible.
 void clearRedoStack()
          Remove everything currently in the redo stack.
 void clearUndoStack()
          Remove everything currently in the undo stack.
 Block getRedoElement(int index)
          Get the nth element in the Redo stack.
 int getRedoStackSize()
           
 Block getUndoElement(int index)
          Get the nth element in the Undo stack.
 int getUndoStackSize()
           
 Block popNextRedoBlock()
           
 Block popNextUndoBlock()
           
protected  void recheckButtons()
          Sets all listening buttons to the appropriate state.
 void stealButtons(UndoRedoStack victim)
          Replaces this Stack's listeners with the given stack's.

getUndoElement

public Block getUndoElement(int index)
Get the nth element in the Undo stack. Useful for saving the stack without destroying it.

Parameters:
index -
Returns:
the Block at index in the undo stack.

getRedoElement

public Block getRedoElement(int index)
Get the nth element in the Redo stack. Useful for saving the stack without destroying it.

Parameters:
index -
Returns:
the Block at index in the redo stack.
